raw_input:
[4.0/5] May work for you depending on eye shape Magnetic eyelashes are an interesting concept for those times you want a dramatic look but don't want the hassle of glue on lashes. The magnetic liner works well but it must be applied pretty thick in order to give enough area for the lashes to stick. You have to be careful when placing them also as you cannot really adjust the position because pulling the lashes off usually tears the liner off with it, so you have to then clean the lashes and reapply liner if you make a mistake which is kind of a hassle. The two lashes included here are nice but neither one really worked for my eye shape, I got another kit which had 7 different shapes in it and that one had two styles that work well for me so I would probably recommend getting one with more options to ensure you find one that fits your eye shape. [3.0/5] Why didn't they add another magnet, so you can trim them? This was my first magnetic eyeliner and eyelash kit. The eyeliner works great and the lashes adhere very well. The eyelashes themselves are beautiful and I love the lengths. The liner is easy to put on and so are the lashes. And, they stay on very well, with one exception.

The eyelashes are too wide for my eyes, and I need to cut the last magnet off for them to fit properly. But, when I do that the outer end flips up and makes the lashes look terrible. If I don't cut them, they stick into the inner corner of my eyes, causing major irritation and immediately flip up, also making them look terrible. 
I feel like they need one more magnet on the outer end, close to the last magnet. Because, most people need to trim any and all eyelashes, in order to make them fit their eyes better. In every video I've ever watched with glue on lashes, the person always has to trim the eyelashes just a little bit shorter in width. Why didn't the manufacturers of these eyelashes think that it would not be the same for these lashes?

I love the concept, and really wish that these worked for me, because I have very dry eyes and cannot wear eye makeup and mascara. They just need another magnet! [4.0/5] I am pleasantly surprised! I've never used magnetic lashes before, but was very intrigued! These magnetic lashes + the eyeliner are STRONG! I've attached photos of the lashes after wearing them for 10 hours at my workplace. The magnetic lashes and the liner are so strong in fact, that I actually ripped out a lash because I accidentally had the magnetic liner on my lash!

I'm very impressed by how well it stuck onto my eye throughout the day. I am also VERY surprised of the formula of the eyeliner. I have tried many, many waterproof, smudgeproof eyeliners, but this eyeliner is by far THE MOST waterproof and smudgeproof! I have oily eyelids and my original waterproof eyeliner would still smear on my lower lids (I bought a waterproof Missha eyeliner for $27 and it still smudges!)

Not only that, the liner will also remove very easily with micellar water or makeup removing face wash -- it washes off so clean that I don't have to follow up with another makeup wipe after the shower. This is amazing!

I only really took off 1 star for three reasons:
1) The formula of the eyeliner has a scent that is very perfume-y/chemical-y. This doesn't bother me too much, but I do think that some customers may be bothered by it.
2) The brush of the eyeliner is very flimsy -- it is difficult to get a sharp line, because the brush is so thin.
3) the inner corners of my lashes began to curl up and off my lash line, pulling some eyeliner with it (leaving gaps in my liner).

Overall, I really like this small kit! It is VERY easy to apply and the lashes look so natural! I got very many compliments while wearing these! [5.0/5] Nice quality These lashes have multiple magnets, and since my eyes are small I usually have to trim the lashes, but it still leaves me with several magnets. Providing a nice base to adhere to the liner. . THe liner does not irritate my eyes. Great help for this lady without much lashes. Thank you [2.0/5] Not working out for me I was so excited to try these because I am not capable of applying the false eyelashes with glue and occasionally I want some extra flair. I know with most makeup you have to practice a few times before you can get it right, but I’ve tried these eyelashes many times and I cannot make them look good for the life of me.
If you are not good at applying liquid eyeliner then you definitely won’t be able to get the magnetic fluid across your eyes to look good. When you try to apply the eyelashes to it, you will still see a choppy line. If you don’t get that right the rest of it looks terrible. I had to watch a few different YouTube videos to see if I could get any tips or tricks.
One thing that did help was trimming the eyelashes. I could not figure out why my eyes kept watering every single time I applied the lashes and I found it was because the lashes were too wide. Once I did that, they did not irritate me as much. Before I trimmed them it felt like little metal pieces were scraping me. I’m using the smallest size which is 12 mm and they still look very exaggerated. There is no way that I would wear this for every day use as it suggests.
I’ve attempted to wear these about 5 times. They just don’t line up on my lashes and look horribly fake.
On top of all this, through my 5 attempts of trying to apply these, 2 of the 5 magnets have fallen off. The information in the item description says you can use them as regular falsies when the magnets fall off but that’s not going to happen for me. [5.0/5] Magnetic magic !!! MAGNETIC MAGIC!!! Love these magnet lashes. They attach so easily and quickly. Love the magnetic eyeliner that it comes with it. Stays on all night! Super cute and fluffy lashes with a soft comfortable band. [1.0/5] Disappointed I wanted to love this product but can’t. The magnet from one of the lashes was stuck on the magnet holding them in the box so that pair was done for. I used the other pair for Halloween and they did not stay on. Disappointed. [3.0/5] Only lasted about 3 hours Here are my thoughts after trying them three times. I’m not sure if I’m doing something wrong and perhaps it may require more practice and lots of patience.

So #1: They look beautiful and natural.

I attempted 3 different days to apply the lashes.
1st day I may have applied the lashes to soon, they immediately fell off.

2nd day I allowed the lash glue to dry. Lashes lasted only a couple hours and then began to fall off.

3rd day they lasted a couple hours until they fell off again.

The biggest issue is there were no instructions provided. [4.0/5] Good if you like eyeliner These are just okay. They look really nice and are attractive lashes, but you have to put on so much eyeliner to get them to stay on that you end up looking ridiculous. I trimmed the lashes to make them shorter so as to take up less room on my eye so I didn't have to do such dark liner all the way across and it still looks ridiculous. Then, once you've put them on, you can't move them around or else the liner starts to come off! I also can't figure out how to get them to lay on my lashes so it looks like I have two sets of lashes on. These are likely for someone with way more magnetic lash experience than I have. I wouldn't recommend to beginners or people who don't like bold liner. [2.0/5] Wasn't impressed I love the look of fake lashes but I totally suck at putting them on with the glue and just forget about getting them done professionally that cost is ridiculous. I thought these magnetic ones might be a good alternative. The lashes are a little too thick and didn't fit the length of my eye. I tried trimming them down but then the ends would not stay on good. The liner bottle is tiny and seems like it barely has anything in it. After I put the liner on and then placed the lashes over it, I could not move or adjust them or the liner would peel right off and I'd have to reapply it again. [5.0/5] Actual magnetic lashes I'd ordered another inexpensive set that claimed to be magnetic, only to be the normal sort of false eyelashes that I cannot use due to an adhesive allergy. Once I received my refund, I ordered this set. It's exactly what it claims to be, and you might even get a bonus in your package like I did. [5.0/5] Works great I got these for my daughter for her birthday! They were super easy to put on and they looked awesome! They are long and fluffy. They work great !

response:
Here is a summary of the product reviews:

Overall, customers have mixed opinions about these magnetic eyelashes. The lashes themselves are generally considered attractive, natural-looking, and fluffy, and several customers appreciate the convenience of the magnetic system compared to traditional glue-on lashes. The magnetic eyeliner is praised by some for being extremely strong, waterproof, and smudge-proof, and it removes easily with micellar water or makeup remover.

However, there are several recurring complaints. The biggest issue is fit, as many customers find the lashes too wide for their eye shape and need to trim them. This creates a problem because trimming removes magnets from the ends, causing the lashes to flip up and not stay in place. Customers recommend buying a kit with more style options to find a better fit.

Application is another common challenge. The liner must be applied thickly for the lashes to adhere, which some find too bold-looking. Once the lashes are placed, they cannot be adjusted without pulling off the liner, requiring the whole process to start over. Some customers also note that the liner brush is flimsy and hard to work with. A few customers report the lashes only lasting a few hours before falling off, and one customer received a damaged product out of the box.

The product is generally recommended for those with experience using false lashes and those who are comfortable wearing bold eyeliner, but is not considered beginner-friendly.
